name: Coconut-Chocolate Cookie Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter or margarine in a large mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium to high speed for 30 seconds.
2. Add the sugar, cocoa powder, and baking powder, stirring until combined.
3. Beat in the egg yolk and vanilla extract until well mixed.
4. Gradually beat in the flour until incorporated.
5. Stir any remaining flour into the mixture with a wooden spoon.
6. Spread the dough evenly on a lightly greased 12-inch pizza pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Meanwhile, beat the egg slightly in a medium saucepan.
9. Stir in the evaporated milk, sugar, and butter or margarine. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and the mixture just comes to a boil.
10. Remove from heat and stir in the coconut and chopped pecans.
11. Spread the mixture evenly over the crust.
12. Bake for an additional 5 minutes.
13. Cool in the pan on a wire rack. Garnish with chocolate curls if desired.
14. Cut into wedges to serve. Makes 12 to 16 servings.
